arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the CodeCommit repository.

clone_url_http.description: The URL to use for cloning the repository over HTTP.

clone_url_ssh.description: The URL to use for cloning the repository over SSH.

id.description: The ID of the CodeCommit repository.

kms_key_id.description: The ID of the AWS KMS key used to encrypt the repository.

repository_id.description: The unique identifier for the CodeCommit repository.
